svg.text: Conclusion: SFT consistently decreases out-of-distribution, RL consistently improves — "SFT memorizes, RL generalizes"

text.font-family: Arial, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif

svg.text: Key premise: End-to-end RL without SFT completely fails (output is unstructured, reward cannot be computed)
